children.heading: Establishment of criteria and procedures
children.label: a Establishment of criteria and procedures

children.text: establish criteria and procedures under which sound recordings may be included in the National Recording Registry, except that no sound recording shall be eligible for inclusion in the National Recording Registry until 10 years after the recording’s creation;

establish procedures under which the general public may make recommendations to the National Recording Preservation Board established under subchapter III regarding the inclusion of sound recordings in the National Recording Registry; and
determine which sound recordings satisfy the criteria established under paragraph (1) and select such recordings for inclusion in the National Recording Registry.

children.heading: Publication of sound recordings in the Registry
children.label: b Publication of sound recordings in the Registry
children.text: The Librarian shall publish in the Federal Register the name of each sound recording that is selected for inclusion in the National Recording Registry.
